One Link
Get One Link
Terms

One Link is yours.

One Link is free software released under the GNU Affero General Public License version 3. You can use it for anything, copy it, modify it, run your own, build a product on top of it. The only condition is that if you offer a modified version to others (over a network or otherwise), you must publish the source of those modifications under the same license.

We do not have a service agreement because we do not run a service for you. The relays we run are a contribution to the network, not an obligation to you. The network keeps working whether we exist or not.

We make no warranty of any kind. One Link is provided as is. If it deletes your dog's photos, we are sorry, and we will help you debug it on GitHub, but legally we owe you nothing. The software is what it is.

Last updated 2026-05-16.
